modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access FM work order system for submitting requests

full_description_text: I’m trying to set up my account to get into the FM work order system but it’s not working. I can’t submit any work orders because I can’t access webtma at all. I just need to know how to get this sorted out so I can do my requests. It’s really frustrating not being able to submit anything.
